title: Dense Smoky Italian Tomato Pasta
description: A velvety, smoky tomato pasta served in a wrapped agave leaf, showcasing Roman flair and high protein.
instructions: Wrap a wide ttukbaegi earthenware pot in the large agave leaf and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in the pot over medium heat until shimmering.
Add the minced garlic and diced onion, sautéing until translucent.
Stir in the smoked paprika and dried oregano, cooking until fragrant.
Pour in the tomato puree and beef stock, bringing the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Let the sauce reduce for 8 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta for 8 minutes until al dente.
Drain the pasta, reserving one cup of the cooking water.
Add the cooked pasta to the sauce, tossing to coat; add reserved water if the sauce is too thick.
Fold in the grated parmesan until silky, then plate onto a folded agave leaf and sprinkle with black pepper.
